author: mj12albert
body: Allows individual labelling of checkboxes/radios within a group: ```jsx Fuji Japanese: ふじ, Hepburn: Fuji Gala Kidd's Orange Red x Golden Delicious ``` ### Other changes - Updated all the `Fieldset` usage to avoid redundant grouping elements (https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/2773) - Initialize Field's `controlId` from FieldRoot instead of the wrapped component, fixes these Chrome errors: - Internally a `LabelableProvider` is split off from FieldRootContext and colocates some repetitive code related to `id`-ing labelable elements Fixes https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/2172 Fixes https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/2773 - [x] I have followed (at least) the [PR section of the contributing guide](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/HEAD/CONTRIBUTING.md#sending-a-pull-request).
title: [field] New `Field.Item` part
